fail-reason.exhausted: You are too tired to run a shop right now.
fail-reason.cant-be-shop: This building can't be a shop.
fail-reason.no-warps-in: This building has no entrance for customers.
fail-reason.warp-blocked: This building's entrance tile is not passable by customers.
fail-reason.no-reachable: This building has no walkable tiles for customers.
fail-reason.not-farm-building: You can only open a shop in farm buildings (e.g. a shed).
fail-reason.no-items-for-sale: Put out some items on tables for sale, and make sure customers can reach them.
fail-reason.green-rain: The green rain looks pretty bad out there, doubt anyone would come today.
fail-reason.too-tired: You are too tired to do any shopkeeping (not enough energy).
fail-reason.other-farmer: You can't open a shop while another player is in the same location.
fail-reason.tile-position: Clear the space behind the cash register (i.e. one tile above) to handle sales!
fail-reason.everyone-hate: No one wants to buy your things, try selling something else.
bonus.title: Decorate your store to sell for higher prices!
bonus.unreachable-table: WARNING: You have {{count}} unreachable tables that hold a sellable item.
